# Review ledger artifact

Command-owned review ledger artifact for one review round.

- Schema JSON: [review-ledger.schema.json](../../../../schema/artifacts/review-ledger.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.ReviewLedger`

## Root Shape

ReviewLedger is the command-owned ledger artifact tracking submission status for a review round.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the review kind for the round. |
| `round_id` | `string` | yes | RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round. |
| `slots` | `array<ReviewLedgerSlot> | null` | yes | Slots lists the current state of every manifest slot. |
| `updated_at` | `string` | yes | UpdatedAt is the timestamp of the most recent ledger update. |

## Definitions

## ReviewLedger

ReviewLedger is the command-owned ledger artifact tracking submission status for a review round.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the review kind for the round. |
| `round_id` | `string` | yes | RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round. |
| `slots` | `array<ReviewLedgerSlot> | null` | yes | Slots lists the current state of every manifest slot. |
| `updated_at` | `string` | yes | UpdatedAt is the timestamp of the most recent ledger update. |

## ReviewLedgerSlot

ReviewLedgerSlot records the current state for one reviewer slot in the ledger.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | yes | Name is the human-readable dimension label. |
| `slot` | `string` | yes | Slot is the stable slot identifier. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the current submission status for the slot. |
| `submission_path` | `string` | yes | SubmissionPath is the path where the slot submission should exist. |
| `submitted_at` | `string` | no | SubmittedAt is the submission timestamp when the slot has been submitted. |
